title: ConvertKit vs MailerLite (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit vs MailerLite. We review pricing, features, ease of use, and more to help you choose.
intro: ConvertKit and MailerLite are two popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences with distinct strengths. ConvertKit targets creators and course sellers with advanced automation, while MailerLite appeals to small businesses seeking affordability and simplicity. This comparison helps you decide which platform aligns best with your goals and budget.
choose_a_if: You're a creator or course seller needing sophisticated automation workflows
You want built-in e-commerce features for selling digital products
Advanced subscriber tagging and segmentation is critical to your strategy
choose_b_if: You're budget-conscious and need affordability without compromising core features
You prefer a user-friendly drag-and-drop interface for email design
You want built-in pop-ups and surveys for audience engagement

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite offers better value and higher ratings for beginners, while ConvertKit excels for creators with advanced automation requirements. Both are solid choices—pick based on your priorities and use case rather than overall superiority.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or MailerLite?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to ConvertKit's $29/month. Both offer identical free tiers with 1,000 subscribers, making MailerLite the budget-friendly choice for growing businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from MailerLite to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber list and campaigns between platforms. Most email marketing tools support CSV exports and imports, though you may lose some automation workflows during the transition. Plan the migration carefully to minimize downtime.
